name: Helix Keybindings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Setup GitHub Action based release mechanism by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/52 https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/53
* Upgrade dated actions on the test pipeline by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/54
* Cleanup release pipeline by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/55 https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/56
* Latest Recomendations from the Obsidion website by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/57
* Use App token for releases by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/58 https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/59 https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/60  https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/61


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/compare/0.1.12...0.1.13

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add official obsidian linting by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/38
* Fix linting issues for plugin publishing by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/41
* Describe this plugin as installable through obsidian itself by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/50
* Tell codemirror-helix to not add drawSelection extension by @mjs in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/48
* feat: Upgrade codemirror-helix by @marcesquerra in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/51

## New Contributors
* @mjs made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/pull/48

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidian-helix/obsidian-helix/compare/0.1.11...0.1.12

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Upgrade to latest `codemirror-helix` version (0.5.0)
 * Prepare for inclusion to the official obsidian plugins list

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fixed

- Add `@codemirror/view` to dependencies

Also, here are the changes from 0.1.9, which didn't compile on the CI.

## [0.1.9]

### Added

- Set cursor color based on accent color by default. (#12)
- Section on README explaining how to customize cursor color. (#12)

### Changed

- Update codemirror-helix to 0.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
The last version did not update `manifest.json`, causing BRAT not to apply the update. Thanks to @gyungchaehan for spotting and fixing this. Please update to get the changes from version 0.1.7.

### Fixed

- Incorrect version in `manifest.json` (#11 by gyungchaehan)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Changed

- Update codemirror-helix to 0.2.0

### Fixed

- Match-surround not working (#9)
- Bar-cursor padding causing confusion (#10)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added

- Setting to change the cursor type appearing in insert mode. The default is a "bar" cursor, like in Obsidian with Vim bindings.

### Changed

- Update codemirror-helix to 0.0.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fixed

- Missing CM6 dependency causing failing build

The 0.1.2 update failed to compile. Here's its changelog as well:

### Changed

- Reload no longer needed to enable or disable the bindings
- Update to codemirror-helix 0.0.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added

- Enable Helix keybindings in plugin settings
- Command to toggle Helix keybindings
